content_body: My family of 14 had a great vacation here celebrating Christmas and Hanukkah. We had so much fun! There was so much to do. The kids had fun in the hot tub and playing games outside. We took our 4-Wheelers around and found some fun trails. The view is amazing and Thank you for sharing your home. We hope some of us will be back this summer.
title: Celebrating Christmas and Hanukkah in the North Georgia Mountains
